creator: cvs-src@yandex.ru
text: Epoz it's an very old wysiwyg editor used in plone long time ago. It was later changed by Kupu (Products.kupu) and right now it has no use in the tree. Last release is from 2006/01/24 so it will not work correctly with modern browsers. Port is unmaintained (since 01 Sep 2008) and noone port is depend on it, so it's safe to deprecate and later remove.
